&nbsp; /conversations&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; My conversation list</div><div>POST&nbsp; &nbsp;/conversations&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Start a new chat or group</div><div>GET&nbsp; &nbsp; /conversations/:id&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Get conversation details</div><div>POST&nbsp; &nbsp;/conversations/:id/members&nbsp; &nbsp; Add someone to a group</div><div>DELETE /conversations/:id/members/:userId&nbsp; &nbsp; Remove from group</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="94" width="370" x="640" y="3086" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Patrick Hand;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DPatrick%2BHand;fontSize=14;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="630" y="3200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1020" y="3200" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" connectable="0" parent="12" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontFamily=Patrick Hand;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DPatrick%2BHand;fontSize=14;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<span style="text-align: left;
